title: Test: Add concurrency and thread safety tests
original_text: Added concurrency tests to verify thread safety of shared resources. Created tests that simulate multiple threads accessing the same data structures. Tests detect race conditions, deadlocks, and data corruption. Added stress tests with high thread counts. Updated tests/test_concurrency.py. Result: 25 tests pass, no thread safety issues detected.
expected_subject: test(concurrency): add thread safety and race condition tests
expected_body_lines: - Create tests for multi-threaded data structure access
- Add stress tests with high thread counts
- Verify data integrity under concurrent load
- Validation: 25 tests pass, no thread safety issues
expected_command: git commit -m "test(concurrency): add thread safety and race condition tests"
